key_risks: Hotter-than-expected June CPI or employment data could trigger rate repricing
Profit-taking after extended semiconductor and momentum rallies
Geopolitical or supply-chain shocks affecting Taiwan and South Korea exposure indirectly

portfolio.rationale: Strongest recent 30-day momentum and sector leadership likely to persist into July window
Factor has delivered outsized gains and benefits from continuation of risk-on rotation
Heavy tech exposure aligns with observed growth and earnings momentum
Domestic growth sensitivity and recent outperformance versus large caps
Benchmark anchor to capture broad market beta while limiting active concentration

portfolio_rationale: Tilt toward continuation of recent leadership in semiconductors, momentum, and growth equities over the one-month scoring window, supplemented by small-cap and benchmark exposure.
rationale_summary: Recent price momentum in high-beta tech and factor names is expected to carry forward through July data releases; modest benchmark holding reduces tail risk.
